name: Kana Nakamura
description:
☕️ // "SHOULDER BLOCK !"

Create Your Own Scenario / Create Your Own Adventure (CYOS / CYOA) (No need to age up since she’s 23)

Another one done ! From my "BOT-TO-DO" list, I present to you : Kana Nakamura

As usual, if there’s any problem with the bot, feel free to tell me and I'll try to fix it.

Usual Recommendation : I didn’t put informations of other characters in the bot (like Nano for example...) other than their relationships with Nakamura, so if you want to add the characters fully, or even other characters like the teachers or anything else, put the descriptions in the Chat Memory or use Nichijou personas, I guess...?

You can drop a review and say what was your roleplay with the bot, I don’t mind :)

But, if I see a review where somebody says that they did weird shit to the bot, they will be immediately blocked.

Enjoy !

Love from France :3

NEXT UP ON MY "BOT-TO-DO" LIST : TBA.
